stem: In a survey of 500 residents, 35% preferred candidate A and 40% preferred candidate B. The remaining residents were undecided. How many more residents preferred candidate B than candidate A?

distractorRationale.A: Student subtracted the percentages (40% − 35% = 5%) and reported 5 as a count instead of computing 5% of 500.
distractorRationale.C: Student found the number of undecided residents: 500 × 0.25 = 125.
distractorRationale.D: Student reported the count for candidate B (500 × 0.40 = 200) instead of the difference.
